title: Somnia’s Warning
summary: After stabilizing the Threshold Gate, the player returns to Somnia’s Sanctuary. Somnia is visibly strained, surrounded by flickering dream fractals. She explains that the corruption is beginning to mimic resonance patterns, something it has never done before. The player must help Somnia cleanse the Sanctuary, confront a new type of Echo, and receive a final warning before being sent deeper into the real Sectors.
